---
lang: en-CA
format:
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    documentclass: article
    papersize: letter
    fontsize: 10pt
    geometry:
      - top=0.58in
      - bottom=0.62in
      - left=0.70in
      - right=0.70in
    include-in-header: cv-header.tex
    number-sections: false
    toc: false
    keep-tex: false
output-file: cv.pdf
---

```{=latex}
\begin{center}
  {\fontsize{24}{27}\selectfont\bfseries\color{cvnavy} Gabriel Frazer-McKee}\\[0.65em]
  \small
  \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}}
    \cvlink{https://gafrm.github.io}{black}{\faGlobe}{gafrm.github.io}\\[0.16em]
    \cvlink{mailto:gabriel.frazer.mckee@gmail.com}{black}{\faEnvelope}{gabriel.frazer.mckee@gmail.com}\\[0.16em]
    \cvlink{https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0860-6192}{black}{\faOrcid}{0000-0002-0860-6192}\\[0.16em]
    \cvlink{https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=MWAQth4AAAAJ}{black}{\faGraduationCap}{scholar.google.com/citations?user=MWAQth4AAAAJ}\\[0.16em]
    \cvlink{https://github.com/gafrm}{black}{\faGithub}{github.com/gafrm}\\[0.16em]
    \cvlink{https://www.linkedin.com/in/gabriel-frazer-mckee-401586220/}{black}{\faLinkedinIn}{linkedin.com/in/gabriel-frazer-mckee-401586220}\\[0.16em]
    \cvlink{https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Gabriel-Frazer-Mckee}{black}{\faResearchgate}{researchgate.net/profile/Gabriel-Frazer-Mckee}
  \end{tabular}
\end{center}
\vspace{-0.35em}
```

# Education

**PhD in Linguistics**  
Université Laval, Québec City, Canada  
2022–present

**MA in Linguistics**  
Université Laval, Québec City, Canada  
2015–2019

# Teaching Experience

**Lecturer, Université Laval**  
2015–present

- **FRN-1110 — Lexicologie**, Winter 2025

{{< include ../_generated/cv-orcid.md >}}
